name: Coral
description: Branching coral reaching off the reef floor — every redraw regrows each colony’s fork toward a different light.

code.style: --armAng: @rand(16deg, 52deg); --rule: ( /* trunk and arm share one emitted coral color and fork height so the branch stays joined */ --reef: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --th: @r(30, 56); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 46%; width: 8%; bottom: 0; height: calc(@var(--th) * 1% + 16%); border-radius: 99px 99px 0 0; background: @var(--reef); transform-origin: 50% 100%; transform: rotate(@rand(-10deg, 10deg)); transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 46%; width: 8%; bottom: calc(@var(--th) * 1%); height: 34%; border-radius: 99px; background: @var(--reef); transform-origin: 50% 100%; transform: rotate(var(--armAng)); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
